assertions.description: The board_outline reports edge_count: 0 and bounding_box: null, and board_width_mm/board_height_mm are null, even though 5 Edge.Cuts lines exist in the PCB file. Examination of the source shows these edges are defined as fp_line elements inside a footprint rather than as top-level gr_line elements. The analyzer only scans top-level graphic lines for the board outline and misses footprint-embedded Edge.Cuts.
